51.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hakim bint al-Zubayr (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her sister Dubaa'a bint al-Zubayr and took a bite from a piece of meat. He then rose to pray and did not perform ablution.
51.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hakim binti al-Zubayr (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemui saudarinya Dhuba'ah binti al-Zubayr dan mengambil gigitan dari sepotong daging. Kemudian beliau berdiri untuk shalat dan tidak berwudhu.

52.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hakim bint al-Zubayr (may Allah be pleased with her) that she handed the Prophet of Allah ﷺ a piece of meat from a shoulder and he ate from it, then prayed.
52.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hakim binti al-Zubayr (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyerahkan kepada Nabi Allah ﷺ sepotong daging dari bagian bahu dan beliau memakannya, kemudian shalat.

53.iwh_en: It was narrated from Dubaa'a bint al-Zubayr (may Allah be pleased with her) that she presented meat to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he took a bite from it, then prayed and did not perform ablution.
53.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Dhuba'ah binti al-Zubayr (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyajikan daging kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau mengambil gigitan darinya, kemudian shalat dan tidak berwudhu.

54.iwh_en: It was narrated from Dubaa'a bint al-Zubayr ibn Abd al-Muttalib (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Enter ihram and say: 'My place of exiting ihram is wherever You prevent me.' For if you are prevented or fall ill, you will have thereby fulfilled your condition upon your Lord the Almighty."
54.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Dhuba'ah binti al-Zubayr bin Abdul Muthallib (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Berihramlah dan ucapkan: 'Tempat keluarku dari ihram adalah di mana pun Engkau menghalangi aku.' Karena jika kamu terhalang atau sakit, kamu telah memenuhi syaratmu kepada Tuhanmu 'Azza wa Jalla."

55.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that Dubaa'a (may Allah be pleased with her) said: "O Messenger of Allah, I intend to perform Hajj." He said to her: "Perform Hajj and stipulate a condition."
55.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Dhuba'ah (radhiyallahu 'anha) berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, aku ingin melaksanakan haji." Beliau bersabda kepadanya: "Laksanakanlah haji dan buatlah syarat."

56.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Zubayr that Fatima bint Abi Hubaysh (may Allah be pleased with her) narrated to him that she came to the Prophet ﷺ and complained to him about bleeding. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "That is a vein. Watch, and when your period comes, do not pray. When the period passes, purify yourself and pray between one period and the next."
56.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Zubayr bahwa Fatimah binti Abi Hubaysy (radhiyallahu 'anha) menceritakan kepadanya bahwa ia datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan mengadukan pendarahan kepadanya. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Itu adalah pembuluh darah. Perhatikan, dan ketika haidmu tiba, jangan shalat. Ketika haid berlalu, bersucilah dan shalatlahlah di antara satu haid ke haid berikutnya."

57.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "There is no Muslim who plants a crop or a tree such that a bird, a human being, a wild animal, or anything else eats from it, except that it counts for him as charity."
57.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada seorang Muslim pun yang menanam tanaman atau pohon kemudian ada burung, manusia, binatang buas, atau apa pun yang memakannya, kecuali hal itu dihitung sebagai sedekah baginya."

58.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hafsa (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman said she was among those who gave the pledge under the tree. She said: "Yes, O Messenger of Allah." He rebuked her. Hafsa then recited: "And there is none of you but will come to it." The Prophet ﷺ said: "Allah the Almighty has said: 'Then We will rescue those who feared Allah and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.'"
58.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hafshah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita berkata bahwa ia termasuk di antara orang-orang yang memberikan bai'at di bawah pohon. Ia berkata: "Ya, ya Rasulullah." Beliau mencelanya. Hafshah kemudian membaca: "Dan tidak ada seorang pun dari kalian kecuali akan mendatanginya." Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Allah 'Azza wa Jalla telah berfirman: 'Kemudian Kami akan menyelamatkan orang-orang yang bertakwa dan membiarkan orang-orang zalim di dalamnya dalam keadaan berlutut.'"

59.iwh_en: It was narrated from a widowed woman of the Companions (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "He left me with no provision to spend on me, and I did not inherit any of his wealth. If you see fit that I may go to my brothers and family so we can be together, that would be more pleasing to me." She was granted permission to go to her family. She left overjoyed, but when she reached the corridor or the mosque, she was called back. He said to her: "How did you describe it?" She repeated what she had said. He said: "Stay in the dwelling of your husband where the news of his death came to you, until your waiting period is complete." So she completed her waiting period there.
59.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah yang menjanda (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ia meninggalkanku tanpa nafkah dan aku tidak mewarisi hartanya. Jika engkau mengizinkan aku pergi kepada saudara-saudara dan keluargaku agar kita bisa bersama, hal itu lebih aku sukai." Ia diizinkan untuk pergi kepada keluarganya. Ia pergi dengan gembira, namun ketika sampai di lorong atau masjid, ia dipanggil kembali. Beliau berkata kepadanya: "Bagaimana kamu menjelaskannya?" Ia mengulangi apa yang ia katakan. Beliau bersabda: "Tinggallah di tempat tinggal suamimu di mana berita kematiannya datang kepadamu, hingga masa iddahmu selesai." Maka ia menyelesaikan masa iddahnya di sana.

60.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Ayman (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Do not abandon prayer deliberately, for whoever abandons prayer deliberately has absolved himself from the protection of Allah and His Messenger."
60.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Ayman (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Jangan tinggalkan shalat dengan sengaja, karena barangsiapa meninggalkan shalat dengan sengaja maka ia telah melepaskan diri dari perlindungan Allah dan Rasul-Nya."

61.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sharik (may Allah be pleased with her) that she sought the counsel of the Prophet ﷺ regarding killing geckos, and he ordered her to kill them.
61.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Syarik (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia meminta pendapat Nabi ﷺ tentang membunuh cicak, dan beliau memerintahkannya untuk membunuhnya.

62.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of the family (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man said to her: "Why do I not see anyone among your household wearing any jewelry except silver?" She said: "My grandfather was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I was with him, and I was wearing two gold earrings. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Two flames of fire.' So we, the members of this household — none of us wears any jewelry except silver."
62.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita dari keluarga tersebut (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki berkata kepadanya: "Mengapa aku tidak melihat seorang pun dari keluargamu memakai perhiasan selain perak?" Ia berkata: "Kakekku sedang bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dan aku bersamanya, dan aku memakai dua anting emas. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dua nyala api.' Maka kami, anggota keluarga ini — tidak ada seorang pun dari kami yang memakai perhiasan selain perak."

63.iwh_en: It was narrated from Habiba bint Abi Tajra'a (may Allah be pleased with her) that she went with women of Quraysh near the house of Abu Husayn while the Prophet ﷺ was performing sa'y between al-Safa and al-Marwa. She said: "He was walking briskly with his lower garment swirling around him due to the intensity of his pace, and he was saying to his Companions: 'Walk briskly, for Allah has prescribed the sa'y for you.'"
63.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Habibah binti Abi Tajra'ah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia pergi bersama wanita-wanita Quraisy dekat rumah Abu Husain sementara Nabi ﷺ sedang melakukan sa'i antara Shafa dan Marwah. Ia berkata: "Beliau berjalan cepat dengan sarungnya berputar mengelilinginya karena cepatnya langkah beliau, dan beliau bersabda kepada para sahabatnya: 'Berjalanlah cepat, karena Allah telah menetapkan sa'i bagi kalian.'"

64.iwh_en: It was narrated from Habiba bint Abi Tajra'a (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performing sa'y between al-Safa and al-Marwa with people in front of him and him behind them. He was walking so briskly that I could see his knees from the intensity of the pace, with his lower garment swirling around him, and he was saying: 'Walk briskly, for Allah has prescribed the sa'y for you.'"
64.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Habibah binti Abi Tajra'ah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan sa'i antara Shafa dan Marwah dengan orang-orang di depan beliau dan beliau di belakang mereka. Beliau berjalan begitu cepat sehingga aku bisa melihat lututnya dari cepatnya langkah, dengan sarungnya berputar mengelilinginya, dan beliau bersabda: 'Berjalanlah cepat, karena Allah telah menetapkan sa'i bagi kalian.'"

65.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Kurz al-Khuza'iyya (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ regarding the aqiqah. He said: "For a boy, two sheep of similar size; and for a girl, one sheep."
65.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Kurz al-Khuza'iyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ mengenai aqiqah. Beliau bersabda: "Untuk anak laki-laki, dua ekor domba yang sebanding; dan untuk anak perempuan, satu ekor domba."

66.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Kurz al-Khuza'iyya (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "A baby boy was brought to the Prophet ﷺ and urinated on him, so he ordered that water be sprinkled on it. Then a baby girl was brought and she urinated on him, so he ordered that it be washed."
66.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Kurz al-Khuza'iyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seorang bayi laki-laki dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ dan kencing di atasnya, maka beliau memerintahkan agar diperciki air. Kemudian seorang bayi perempuan dibawa dan kencing di atasnya, maka beliau memerintahkan agar dicuci."

67.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Bani Kurz al-Ka'biyya (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ: "For the boy, two sheep; and for the girl, one sheep."
67.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Bani Kurz al-Ka'biyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ: "Untuk anak laki-laki, dua ekor domba; dan untuk anak perempuan, satu ekor domba."

68.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Kurz (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "For a boy, two sheep of similar size; and for a girl, one sheep." I asked Ata: "What are 'similar size'?" He said: "Of equal size." Hajjaj added in his narration: "Sheep are more pleasing to me than goats, and males are more pleasing to me than females." He also mentioned: "It is preferable that they be from the black-faced ones among them."
68.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Kurz (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Untuk anak laki-laki, dua ekor domba yang sebanding; dan untuk anak perempuan, satu ekor domba." Aku bertanya kepada Atha: "Apa yang dimaksud 'sebanding'?" Ia berkata: "Yang setara." Hajjaj menambahkan dalam riwayatnya: "Domba kibas lebih aku sukai daripada kambing, dan yang jantan lebih aku sukai daripada yang betina." Ia juga menyebutkan: "Lebih baik mengambil yang bermuka hitam di antara mereka."

69.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Kurz (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about aqiqah and said: "Sacrifice two sheep for a boy and one for a girl. It does not matter whether they are male or female."
69.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Kurz (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang aqiqah dan bersabda: "Sembelihlah dua ekor domba untuk anak laki-laki dan satu ekor untuk anak perempuan. Tidak masalah apakah mereka jantan atau betina."

70.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of the Companions (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When we left, we said: 'By Allah, if only we had asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ what constitutes deceiving our husbands.' So we went back and asked him." He said: "It is when you show love for, or give gifts to, others using his wealth without his knowledge."
70.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika kami pergi, kami berkata: 'Demi Allah, seandainya kami bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ apa yang dimaksud dengan menipu suami kami.' Maka kami kembali dan bertanya kepadanya." Beliau bersabda: "Yaitu ketika kamu menunjukkan rasa sayang atau memberikan hadiah kepada orang lain menggunakan hartanya tanpa sepengetahuannya."

71.iwh_en: It was narrated from one of the wives of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to fast the nine days of Dhul Hijja, the day of Ashura, and three days from each month — the first Monday of the month and two Thursdays.
71.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari salah satu istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berpuasa sembilan hari di bulan Dzulhijjah, hari Asyura, dan tiga hari dari setiap bulan — Senin pertama di bulan itu dan dua Kamis.

72.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Haram bint Milhan (may Allah be pleased with her) about those who will be like kings upon thrones. She said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, pray to Allah to make me among them.' He said: 'You are among the first ones.'" She was then married by Ubada ibn al-Samit, who took her with him on an expedition. When she crossed the sea, she rode a mount that threw her and she was killed.
72.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Haram binti Milhan (radhiyallahu 'anha) tentang mereka yang akan seperti raja-raja di atas singgasana. Ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, doakan Allah agar menjadikan aku termasuk di antara mereka.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kamu termasuk orang-orang pertama.'" Ia kemudian dinikahi oleh Ubadah bin al-Shamit, yang membawanya serta dalam sebuah ekspedisi. Ketika ia menyeberangi lautan, ia menunggangi tunggangan yang melemparkannya dan ia pun wafat.

73.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I wrapped myself in a garment and greeted him, and that was in the forenoon. He said: 'Who is this?' I said: 'I am Umm Hani.' I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, my maternal cousin claims he will kill a man I have granted protection — so-and-so, the son of Hubayra.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'We grant protection to whomever you have granted protection, O Umm Hani.' When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ finished his bath, he stood and prayed eight rak'ahs wrapped in a single garment."
73.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku membungkus diri dengan kain dan memberi salam kepadanya, dan itu pada waktu dhuha. Beliau berkata: 'Siapa ini?' Aku berkata: 'Aku Umm Hani.' Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, saudara laki-lakiku mengklaim akan membunuh seorang laki-laki yang telah aku lindungi — si fulan, putra Hubayrah.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kami memberikan perlindungan kepada siapa pun yang kamu lindungi, wahai Umm Hani.' Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ selesai mandinya, beliau berdiri dan shalat delapan rakaat terbungkus dalam satu kain."

74.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, I have given protection to two in-laws of mine, and my maternal brother claims he will kill them." He said: "We grant protection to whomever you have granted protection." Water was placed for him in a basin, and I could see the traces of dough in it. He performed ablution — or she said: "bathed" — I am uncertain — and prayed Fajr in a single garment wrapped around him."
74.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, aku telah memberikan perlindungan kepada dua orang ipar laki-lakiku, dan saudara laki-laki ibuku mengklaim akan membunuh mereka." Beliau bersabda: "Kami memberikan perlindungan kepada siapa pun yang kamu lindungi." Air diletakkan untuknya dalam sebuah baskom, dan aku bisa melihat bekas adonan di dalamnya. Beliau berwudhu — atau ia berkata: "mandi" — aku tidak yakin — dan shalat Subuh dalam satu kain yang melilit tubuhnya.

75.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Keep goats, for they bring blessing."
75.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Peliharalah kambing, karena mereka membawa keberkahan."

76.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I could hear the recitation of the Prophet ﷺ while I was on my rooftop shelter."
76.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku bisa mendengar bacaan Nabi ﷺ sementara aku berada di atas tenda atapku."

77.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about the words of Allah the Almighty: "And you commit abomination in your gatherings." He said: "They used to pelt people on the road with pebbles and mock them — that was the abomination they used to commit."
77.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang firman Allah 'Azza wa Jalla: "Dan kalian melakukan kemungkaran di tempat-tempat perkumpulan kalian." Beliau bersabda: "Mereka biasa melempar orang-orang di jalan dengan kerikil dan mengolok-olok mereka — itulah kemungkaran yang biasa mereka lakukan."

78.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "He had some drink brought for him and drank, then handed me the remainder and I drank. I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I was fasting and was reluctant to turn away your leftover.' He said: 'Were you making up a missed fast?' I said: 'No.' He said: 'Then there is no harm upon you.'"
78.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Beliau minum lalu menyerahkan sisanya kepadaku dan aku minum. Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, aku sedang berpuasa dan enggan menolak sisa minumanmu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Apakah kamu sedang mengganti puasa yang terlewat?' Aku berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Maka tidak ada dosa atasmu.'"

79.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, I have done something and I do not know whether it pleases you or not." He said: "What is that, O Umm Hani?" She said: "I was fasting and was reluctant to turn away your leftover, so I drank it." He said: "Was it a voluntary fast or an obligatory one?" She said: "Voluntary." He said: "The one fasting voluntarily is his own master — if he wishes he fasts, and if he wishes he breaks his fast."
79.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, aku telah melakukan sesuatu dan aku tidak tahu apakah itu menyenangkanmu atau tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Apa itu, wahai Umm Hani?" Ia berkata: "Aku sedang berpuasa dan enggan menolak sisa minumanmu, maka aku meminumnya." Beliau bersabda: "Apakah itu puasa sunnah atau wajib?" Ia berkata: "Sunnah." Beliau bersabda: "Orang yang berpuasa sunnah adalah tuannya sendiri — jika ia mau, ia berpuasa; dan jika ia mau, ia berbuka."

80.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "He entered in the forenoon and water was poured for him into a bowl of ours — I could see traces of dough in it. He performed ablution or bathed — I am uncertain — and then prayed four rak'ahs in this mosque, the mosque in her house." Yusuf said: "I then stood and performed ablution from her waterskin and prayed four rak'ahs in that mosque."
80.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Beliau masuk pada waktu dhuha dan air dituangkan untuknya ke dalam mangkuk kami — aku bisa melihat bekas adonan di dalamnya. Beliau berwudhu atau mandi — aku tidak yakin — kemudian shalat empat rakaat di masjid ini, masjid yang ada di rumahnya." Yusuf berkata: "Aku kemudian berdiri dan berwudhu dari kantung airnya dan shalat empat rakaat di masjid itu."

81.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: "Will we visit one another after we die and see each other?" The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The souls will be birds perching in trees. When the Day of Resurrection comes, every soul will enter its body."
81.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: "Apakah kita akan saling mengunjungi setelah kita mati dan saling melihat?" Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Arwah-arwah itu adalah burung-burung yang bertengger di pepohonan. Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, setiap jiwa akan masuk ke dalam tubuhnya."

82.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ finished his bath, he rose and prayed eight rak'ahs wrapped in a single garment. Then he finished and she said: "O Messenger of Allah, my maternal brother claims he will kill a man I have granted protection — so-and-so, the son of Hubayra." He said: "We grant protection to whomever you have granted protection, O Umm Hani." Umm Hani said: "And that was in the forenoon."
82.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ selesai mandinya, beliau bangkit dan shalat delapan rakaat terbungkus dalam satu kain. Kemudian beliau selesai dan ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, saudara laki-laki ibuku mengklaim akan membunuh seorang laki-laki yang telah aku lindungi — si fulan, putra Hubayrah." Beliau bersabda: "Kami memberikan perlindungan kepada siapa pun yang kamu lindungi, wahai Umm Hani." Umm Hani berkata: "Dan itu pada waktu dhuha."

83.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ came to Mecca one time and he had four braids in his hair."
83.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ datang ke Mekah suatu kali dan beliau memiliki empat kepang rambut."

84.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I saw on the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ four braids."
84.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku melihat di kepala Rasulullah ﷺ empat kepang."

85.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd Allah ibn al-Harith that a man asked him about the forenoon prayer. He said: "I asked the Companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about it and could not find anyone to tell me that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed it, except that Umm Hani told me that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon her and prayed eight rak'ahs. I never saw him pray it before or after that."
85.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah bin al-Harith bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepadanya tentang shalat dhuha. Ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada para sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ tentangnya dan tidak dapat menemukan seorang pun yang memberitahuku bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melaksanakannya, kecuali bahwa Umm Hani memberitahuku bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ masuk menemuinya dan shalat delapan rakaat. Aku tidak pernah melihat beliau shalat itu sebelum atau sesudahnya."

86.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed eight rak'ahs at her home, wrapped in a single garment.
86.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ shalat delapan rakaat di rumahnya, terbungkus dalam satu kain.

87.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that she came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: "O Messenger of Allah, I am a heavy woman — teach me something I can say while sitting." He said: "Say 'Allahu Akbar' one hundred times, for it is better for you than one hundred camels adorned and accepted as sacrifice. Say 'Al-hamdu lillah' one hundred times, for it is better for you than one hundred horses saddled and bridled that you send in the way of Allah. And say 'Subhan Allah' one hundred times, for it is better for you than freeing one hundred slaves from the descendants of Isma'il."
87.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, aku adalah wanita yang gemuk — ajarkan aku sesuatu yang bisa aku ucapkan sambil duduk." Beliau bersabda: "Ucapkan 'Allahu Akbar' seratus kali, karena itu lebih baik bagimu daripada seratus unta yang dihias dan diterima sebagai kurban. Ucapkan 'Alhamdulillah' seratus kali, karena itu lebih baik bagimu daripada seratus kuda yang dipelana dan dikekang yang kamu kirimkan di jalan Allah. Dan ucapkan 'Subhanallah' seratus kali, karena itu lebih baik bagimu daripada memerdekakan seratus budak dari keturunan Ismail."

88.iwh_en: It was narrated from a wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was with her on her day or night and heard the mu'adhdhin, he would repeat what the mu'adhdhin said.
88.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari salah satu istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ bersamanya pada hari atau malamnya dan mendengar mu'adzin, beliau mengulangi apa yang diucapkan mu'adzin.

89.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba bint Abi Sufyan (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever prays twelve rak'ahs voluntarily in a day, beyond the obligatory prayers, a house will be built for him in Paradise."
89.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah binti Abi Sufyan (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa shalat dua belas rakaat sunnah dalam sehari, selain shalat wajib, akan dibangunkan untuknya sebuah rumah di surga."

90.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman said: "We used to travel at the early morning from al-Muzdalifa to Mina during the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ." Samura said: "We used to travel early in the morning during the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from al-Muzdalifa to Mina."
90.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang wanita berkata: "Kami biasa berangkat di awal pagi dari Muzdalifah ke Mina pada masa Rasulullah ﷺ." Samurah berkata: "Kami biasa berangkat di awal pagi pada masa Rasulullah ﷺ dari Muzdalifah ke Mina."

91.iwh_en: It was narrated from a wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: "The angels do not accompany a group that has a bell with them."
91.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari salah satu istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: "Para malaikat tidak menemani suatu kelompok yang memiliki lonceng bersama mereka."

92.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she called for saffron and rubbed it on her forearms, saying: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say — or: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'It is not permissible for a woman who believes in Allah and the Last Day to observe mourning for a deceased person for more than three days, except for a husband — she mourns for him four months and ten days.'"
92.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia meminta kunyit dan menggosokkannya pada lengannya, seraya berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda — atau: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak halal bagi seorang wanita yang beriman kepada Allah dan Hari Akhir untuk berkabung atas orang yang meninggal lebih dari tiga hari, kecuali untuk suaminya — ia berkabung untuknya selama empat bulan sepuluh hari.'"

93.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ: "Perform ablution from whatever has been touched by fire."
93.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ: "Berwudhulah dari apa pun yang telah tersentuh api."

94.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: "The angels do not accompany a group that has a bell with them."
94.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: "Para malaikat tidak menemani suatu kelompok yang memiliki lonceng bersama mereka."

95.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: "The angels do not accompany a group that has a bell with them." He confirmed: "You are correct."
95.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: "Para malaikat tidak menemani suatu kelompok yang memiliki lonceng bersama mereka." Beliau membenarkan: "Engkau benar."

96.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray while wearing a garment that he and I shared, and in it was what was in it."
96.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat mengenakan kain yang beliau dan aku berbagi, dan di dalamnya ada apa yang ada di dalamnya."

97.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she heard the Prophet ﷺ say: "Whoever prays four rak'ahs before Dhuhr and four after it, Allah will forbid the Fire from touching him."
97.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa shalat empat rakaat sebelum Dhuhur dan empat rakaat setelahnya, Allah akan mengharamkan api neraka untuk menyentuhnya."

98.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she was asked: "Did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray in the single garment in which he was intimate with you?" She said: "Yes, when there was no impurity on it."
98.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia ditanya: "Apakah Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dengan kain yang beliau gunakan saat berhubungan intim denganmu?" Ia berkata: "Ya, ketika tidak ada najis di atasnya."

99.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ sent her ahead from Jam' at night — or: she was sent ahead from Jam' at night.
99.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengirimnya terlebih dahulu dari Jam' pada malam hari — atau: ia dikirim terlebih dahulu dari Jam' pada malam hari.

100.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man came to her nephew and she called for thin gruel for him, and he drank it. She said to him: "O nephew, will you not perform ablution?" He said: "I have not done anything to require it." She said: "Indeed, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Perform ablution from whatever has been touched by fire.'"
100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki datang kepada keponakannya dan ia memanggilkan sup encer untuknya, dan ia meminumnya. Ia berkata kepadanya: "Wahai keponakanku, tidakkah kamu berwudhu?" Ia berkata: "Aku tidak melakukan apa pun yang mengharuskannya." Ia berkata: "Sesungguhnya Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berwudhulah dari apa pun yang telah tersentuh api.'"
